title: Iran’s 'oil lifeline’ has been left untouched in the conflict. What happens if it's seized?
summary_full: Analysts say any attempt to attack or seize Iran’s strategic oil hub is likely to be fraught with risk.
summary_public: Analysts say any attempt to attack or seize Iran’s strategic oil hub is likely to be fraught with risk.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran’s 'oil lifeline’ has been left untouched in the conflict.
